name: 008-hipaa-phi-violations
description: HIPAA pilot fixture: a small patient-records service with one violation per shipped rule — a patient store that persists SSN and diagnosis as plaintext columns (HIPAA-001, §164.312(a)(2)(iv)), an EHR sync that POSTs PHI to an http:// endpoint (HIPAA-002, §164.312(e)), a patient endpoint that returns the full record with no access check or minimum-necessary projection (HIPAA-003, §164.312(a)(1)/§164.502(b)), a records endpoint that reads PHI with only a console.log and no audit-trail entry (HIPAA-004, §164.312(b)), and a PHI access guard that rejects denied access with 403 without recording the failed attempt (HIPAA-005, §164.308(a)(1)(ii)(D)).
